en: A SONG OF ASCENTS. OF DAVID.Behold, how good and pleasant it is when brothers dwell in unity!
zh: 看哪！弟兄和睦共處， 是多麼的善，多麼的美。

en: It is like the precious oil on the head, running down on the beard, on the beard of Aaron, running down on the collar of his robes!
zh: 這好比那珍貴的油澆在亞倫的頭上， 流到鬍鬚， 又從亞倫的鬍鬚， 流到他的衣領上。

en: It is like the dew of Hermon, which falls on the mountains of Zion! For there the LORD has commanded the blessing, life forevermore.
zh: 又好比黑門的甘露 落在錫安的眾山上， 在那裡有耶和華命定的福， 就是永遠的生命。
